---
ID: US-OLV-030
Title: Manage account stakeholders
Status: Code Present
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-16
Milestone: Port Accounts UX and complete module hub shell

As a account manager
I want to add, edit, sort, and delete stakeholders
So that relationship maps stay current

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] PeopleSection renders account stakeholders with pagination or card/list controls.
- [ ] Users can add a new stakeholder inline.
- [ ] Editing stakeholder fields saves to state and persistence path.
- [ ] Deleting a stakeholder uses the undo/soft-delete pattern where implemented.

Notes: Includes seniority, executive, incomplete, V.Two owner, and engagement filters.
